component.name: DNF Package Manager
component.summary: Modern GUI package manager for Fedora Linux

description.p: A Discovery alternative that uses real DNF and Flatpak commands for reliable, terminal-grade updates.

Features: system updates, installed packages browser, Flatpak manager with Flathub search, system info dashboard, quick tools (RPM Fusion, codecs, dev tools, VS Code, fwupd), repository manager, transaction history with undo, and auto-update.
